title: Free Whaley
author: Jonathan Yardley
description:
**Free Whaley** transforms complex marine conservation data into an interactive browser game, addressing public disconnect with commercial whaling threats and ocean science.

* **Gamified Conservation:** Translates real-world IWC datasets and harpoon threat mechanics into dynamic player interactions.
* **Vibe-Coded Web Interface:** Built using rapid natural language prompts (`Up/W`, `Down/S`, `Right/D` control logic).
* **Impact-Driven Feedback:** Delivers real-time educational context upon crit

title: BioBlitz Go
author: Jonathan Yardley
description:
**BioBlitz Go** is a browser-based, AI-assisted field tool that addresses the challenge of making nature recording engaging while keeping unverified machine learning suggestions clearly separated from structured, real-world biodiversity observations.

Key Features:
* **Adaptive Session Modes:** Supports **Compete** (timed group hunt), **Learn** (guess before AI reveal), and **Survey** (structured capture).
* **Clear AI Boundaries:** Uses `Google Gemini` for field ID suggestions, clearly marking

title: Emoji Autocomplete Party
author: Kalindi Fonda
description: Type : followed by text to get emoji suggestions (e.g. :fish -> 🐟). Works in text fields and rich editors. But it doesn't end there: confetti, sounds, swimming fish, growing flowers and more. Let's get the emoji party started!

title: Eco & Evo Jobs
author: Caleb Charpentier
description:
## Eco & Evo Jobs: A Curated Career Hub

The Eco & Evo Jobs portal is a streamlined, user-focused dashboard for researchers. With a sleek dark-mode aesthetic, it aggregates over 2,000 listings from specialized sources like EvolDir and Science Careers.

**Core Features:**
* **Precision Filtering:** Sort by date, institution, or deadline.
* **Real-Time Data:** Updated daily for active opportunities.
* **Interactive Maps:** Spatial job discovery.

title: Ecology Vibe Coding
author: Karina Torres
description:
A goofy little repo blending ecology and AI with pure vibe-coding energy.

### 🌟 Core Features
* **iNat Suite**: Web tools to query taxa, annotate traits, and use CLIP models to explore hidden secondary data.
* **TAMU Job Board**: A serverless dashboard tracking ecology jobs, automated via GitHub Actions.
* **Local Scripts**: Quick image cropping and custom GBIF mapping.
